arts.ttl: PSG’s €20M-Rated Ace Hints at Long Term West Ham Stay After Loan Ends
arts.sum: Carlos Soler, currently on loan from Paris Saint-Germain to West Ham United, likely realized he needed a fresh start this summer to secure regular playing time. Watching Spain win the UEFA Euro 2024 title may have further motivated him to get back on La Roja’s radar. Several clubs expressed interest in Soler during the summer […] The post PSG’s €20M-Rated Ace Hints at Long Term West Ham Stay After Loan Ends appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Referee briefly stops French league match between PSG and Lyon after homophobic chants
arts.sum: Earlier this month, a French campaign group renewed calls for authorities to take action against homophobic chanting by soccer fans, saying Marseille supporters belted out anti-gay slurs “with complete impunity” during a home game against Monaco. Homophobic insults often heard at Ligue 1 matches have been tolerated for a long time by club officials, and soccer authorities have struggled to find appropriate ways of tackling the issue.

arts.ttl: Rúben Amorim Explains Decision for Leaving £40M PSG-Linked Ace at Home vs. Man City
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to leave Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho out of Manchester United’s group for Sunday’s derby has fueled speculation about Rashford’s future at the club. The Red Devils were able to do without the two talented players as they had a dramatic come-from-behind 2-1 victory over Manchester City on Sunday night in the […] The post Rúben Amorim Explains Decision for Leaving £40M PSG-Linked Ace at Home vs. Man City appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Man Utd keen on PSG's Kolo Muani - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United keen on PSG forward Randal Kolo Muani, Newcastle United looking at move for Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen, Leicester City plan Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall return, plus more.

arts.ttl: Man City Plot to Edge Barcelona, PSG for Bayern Munich Veteran on €20M-a-Year Wages
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been closely monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich in recent months, with reports from Germany suggesting a transfer almost happened last summer. As the January transfer window approaches, one Premier League club could be making a move for the veteran to help stop their free fall. Barcelona are also interested in Kimmich, alongside Bayer Leverkusen’s Jonathan […] The post Man City Plot to Edge Barcelona, PSG for Bayern Munich Veteran on €20M-a-Year Wages appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PSG extend lead at the top with win over Lyon
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain claimed a 3-1 home win over Lyon with early goals from Ousmane Dembélé and Vitinha plus a late strike from Gonçalo Ramos on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man Utd Warned Against Signing €70M-Rated Newcastle, PSG-Linked Scorer
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been linked with several attacking players as 2025 nears. Among the players that the Ligue 1 McDonald’s leaders are connected to is Sporting Lisbon’s Viktor Gyökeres. Foot Mercato recently reported that Luís Campos is rethinking his partnership with Luis Enrique and has shown interest in signing Gyökeres. arts.ttl: Video: Lyon’s Lucas Perri Makes Blunder, Gonçalo Ramos Scores for PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain added a third goal late in the contest against Olympique Lyonnais on Sunday night at the Parc des Princes. The Ligue 1 McDonald’s leaders opened the scoring with two goals in less than 15 minutes, but the boots went quiet afterward. arts.ttl: Video: Vitinha Stays Cool, Calm to Convert Penalty Kick vs. OL
arts.sum: After opening the scoring less than ten minutes into the match, Paris Saint-Germain added their second goal of the contest against Olympique Lyonnais four minutes later.
